news.title: A Look At Seagate Technology (STX) Valuation After Analyst Upgrades And AI Storage Progress
news.summary: Recent rating upgrades and higher expectations from Wall Street have put fresh attention on Seagate Technology Holdings (STX), as investors consider how its AI-focused storage portfolio might influence the stock’s risk and return profile. See our latest analysis for Seagate Technology Holdings. The share price has climbed to $325.99 alongside a 51.59% 3 month share price return and a very large 5 year total shareholder return, suggesting momentum has been building as AI storage news and...

news.title: UBS Maintains Neutral on Seagate Technology Hldgs, Raises Price Target to $335
news.summary: UBS  analyst Timothy Arcuri   maintains Seagate Technology Hldgs (NASDAQ:STX) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $230 to $335.

news.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Seagate Technology Hldgs, Raises Price Target to $385

news.title: Rosenblatt Maintains Buy on Seagate Technology Hldgs, Raises Price Target to $370
news.summary: Rosenblatt  analyst Kevin Cassidy   maintains Seagate Technology Hldgs (NASDAQ:STX) with a Buy and raises the price target from $270 to $370.

news.title: Does Seagate (STX) Leaning Into AI Edge Storage Reframe Its Core Competitive Moat?
news.summary: Earlier in January, Seagate Technology showcased its latest 32TB Exos, SkyHawk AI, and IronWolf Pro hard drives at Intersec 2026, emphasizing edge‑to‑cloud storage solutions for AI-driven video analytics and data-heavy workloads. This focus on mass-capacity drives for AI video image analytics highlights how Seagate is positioning its core storage business around rapidly expanding edge data needs. Next, we'll examine how Seagate's push into AI-focused, high-capacity storage at the edge could...

news.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Micron Technology, Advanced Micro Devices, International Business Machines and Seagate Technology
news.summary: Micron Technology leads a booming integrated systems industry as AI, cloud adoption, and data demand fuel strong growth momentum.

news.title: Seagate Technology Holdings shares are trading higher after Susquehanna upgraded the stock from Negative to Neutral and raised its price target from $150 to $280.
